textByHash.0301f105d9eb19497f3ce74831e2af7cc7143868: My son has just turned 16 and I'd very much like him to join the Imperial Guard. The Prince's elite forces are invite only so it's very unlikely he'll get in. If you can arrange that you have a deal!
textByHash.10654c7c11f32361005fdea799aeded5a8fbe590: I should have my designs ready by the time you have brought me all the materials
textByHash.14d545f7c71e4646a08ac1e1fdedfab41468920d: He is getting on fine! He has just been promoted to Sergeant! I'm really proud of him!
textByHash.23648b5c886e262c59badef2c94deded96e425cf: Well, since you've helped my family out a couple of times, I'd be glad to build a sled for you.
textByHash.252bb204d0ae513d74ad261524b35a2168262cac: Anything else before I get on with my work?
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.2df2333a7b287a82c946122bb196e3b40543a6bf: Excellent! You'll need to bring an Iron bar for the spikes!
textByHash.3c4445a15d22ea7d1e9cc8c1a2456b59d1192c81: He is getting on fine! He has just started his basic training and has already been promoted to corporal! I'm really proud of him!
textByHash.428f25520f648bd7122f6d2cf3259e5c9a7b0641: Well, if it isn't our very own sledder! What can I do for you today?
textByHash.46b135afd9fd1e0376fc12533b1d5df72298d431: Looks like you don't have any room to carry it just now, come back when you do.
textByHash.46bd78a7b8a145ff59539413e3f8945ccd674b04: So you're a smithy are you?
textByHash.492843a6b72c5de6da3ce905ba238770c7cdb5f6: The swamp of course! It's south of Lumbridge.
textByHash.4fed3b267462a4c94ceda04757424723f6d64ee5: He is safe and sound, thanks to you my friend!
textByHash.5378b625218f5c174d83837ec111f3066f5b3daa: A fellow smith is welcome to use my anvil!
textByHash.681c23973e4fc3146af9fd94db58f81aa490507c: Well, unfortunately I can't make the sled without all the materials.
textByHash.78e3d4dabb2d3e63d5cac80e7edc386fe2bc2f37: I don't know. I'm a smith! But maybe you should look for some bees.
textByHash.792a78384a4e1a15ec649feff8e9ba211b750d21: Talk to Denulth, he can tell you all about it. Anything else before I get on with my work?
textByHash.7e71d65321c0c6150e7d80607f6bce46cf820bbb: Sorry, I'll need an Iron bar to make the spikes.
textByHash.8cadd4191c9c2252f039449be2a3a78ce453761a: Now to keep my end of the bargain. Give me the boots and an iron bar and I'll put on the spikes.
textByHash.8eefd755b9145c74133b7d615b8b580c9e664bad: Yeah sure, have you got the maple or yew logs, an iron bar and some rope?
textByHash.92d2432a431d940fd8f6a025c5735d6903944465: Tell you what, I'll make them for you on one condition.
textByHash.970d28ef4fa821c8d31bf70e7c30d8afde9e67af: Looks like you don't have enough money to afford it just now, come back when you do.
textByHash.9798fb02b7ae0b0a7bcc120bec947b117d5be3ed: [laugh], very funny! Aren't you a bit old for rolling around in the snow?
textByHash.9a45daa367814c2d956553a9638c74d44884f656: Yeah, that should do it. I will need some yew or maple logs, a bar of iron and some rope.
textByHash.9e2dae1354776a464546f7251106417a6e53b87d: I see you've got the spiked boots. Are you going to take them to the Sherpa?
textByHash.9f31d41aeb11797e0f0e0525158096196ed24b3d: Maybe if you mix some wax with a bit of swamp tar it will achieve the desired effect. You'll also need something to store the wax in... like a cake tin.
textByHash.9f68646f6841570130ad55a1e2719a633cf72cb6: Have you got all the materials for the sled yet?
textByHash.ab48e3dd5f16224a8558ac1d928234a3c43232ac: So why do you need a sled then?
textByHash.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
textByHash.ac297bcd6c2de2caa7214491b686db7461ac8bba: I have very little to offer you in way of thanks, but perhaps you will accept this family heirloom. It was found by my great-great-grandfather, but we still don't have any idea what it does.
textByHash.c022232e660b62c805addfe6df1eb147b1748986: You will also need a cake tin to store the wax in.
textByHash.c4d4cf50a0007ff2e07c323c6f3fd16d56abc887: You will need some wax and some swamp tar.
textByHash.c731fac8fc5c6acc3b8f0c4e81bbc298f7a8dfc2: Have you managed to get my son signed up for the Imperial Guard?
textByHash.cac80f90e018e2c1fd0abbc2fa94637c82c5ca81: He was captured by those blasted trolls! I don't know what to do. Even the imperial guard are too afraid to go rescue him.
textByHash.d3f4482dabab46670271f3088bde5110fb3648ae: He does, does he? Well I won't do it till he pays for the last set I made for him!
textByHash.d5cc528d81b3aeedd7e49a7e0c6311e0906cd746: Do you realise that you can only use the Climbing boots right now? The Spiked boots can only be used in the Icelands but no ones been able to get there for years!
textByHash.dd43973465761f3827e7961d811048abdc2741ec: Well, I guess some of us never grow up!
textByHash.e340f890941b9c4584af8be98f361f7b168d79d9: Well, here's the sled but it will need to be waxed. The wax will need to both protect the sled as well as smoothen it.
textByHash.efa6c45dbb50b013e19630353a9d83ecd2dc6d0e: Well, I've got one here you can have for 1,000 coins if you'd like it?
textByHash.f842adb568046808a6e74162ba45c1a0c372af13: Good but I need to have the certificate.
